title: Every River
content:
Tuning: Standard
Capo 1
 
[Intro]
G   D   Am   C
G   D   Am   C
 
[Verse]
      G              D
Every river I try to cross
      Am            C
Every hill I try to climb
      G              D
Every ocean I try to swim
      Am            C
Every road I try to find
    G      Em
You ask me to
C          G
Believe in magic
G            Em
Expect me to commit
C              D
Suicide of the heart
        G         Em
And you ask me to play
     C            G
This game without question
Am          C
Raising the stakes on this
Am      D        D
Shotgun roulette
 
[Chorus]
      G              D
Every river I try to cross
      Am            C
Every hill I try to climb
      G              D
Every ocean I try to swim
      Am            C
Every road I try to find
        G          D
All the ways of my life
    Em             C
I'd rather be with you
           G   D
There's no way
Em      C
Without you
 
[Break]
G   D   Am   C
G   D   Am   C   C
 
[Verse]
    G       Em
You came to me
C                G
Like the ways of children
G         Em
Simple as breathing,
C       D
Easy as air
        G             Em
Now the years show no fear,
C                       G
Like the wind they pass over
Am     C
Loved, forgiven,
Am         D    D
Washed and saved
 
[Chorus]
      G              D
Every river I try to cross
      Am            C
Every hill I try to climb
      G              D
Every ocean I try to swim
      Am            C
Every road I try to find
        G          D
All the ways of my life
    Em             C
I'd rather be with you
           G   D
There's no way
Em      C
Without you

X
